title: Kingdoms & Dynasties: Revisited
description: Bringing historical kingdoms and dynasties into Minecraft
body:
![Kingdoms & Dynasties](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f1c3266b26fcd92268953fde48618ee00710e3c.png)

Kingdoms & Dynasties II: Revisited aims to introduce commodities and life in Feudal Japan, with armors, weapons, biomes, building blocks, mobs, mechanics, and more!

As of Alpha 0.8.0, armor customization is integrated to an extent. Players are able to dye multiple parts of the armor sets! As the project develops, you can expect more additions to clothing, armors, weapons, customizabilities, etc. Of course, this mod is not specifically about the armory of Feudal Japan, so expect some new biomes and world generation in the future!

![Contents Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbeb1cdfa5687b6d60f319d964eee492610230f9.png)

HOW TO DYE ARMORS:

Using the Yoroi Stand, you can dye the armors in 4 different methods (primary, secondary, lining 1 and 2).

you must use as much dyes as you have armors (helmet + chestplate + leggings = 3 total dyes to be placed at once per area
For further customization, you can take out a few armor parts if you want to specifically edit only one part
Using the crafting table, you can dye another part of the armors! (Chin straps, armor sleeves, etc!)

There is a video that demonstrates the mechanics in the media area

Note: not all armors can be dyed using all of the different methods!!!
